# Bush Digital Guides

> Practical local growth and digital systems support for regional Australian small businesses.

Bush Digital Guides helps regional businesses get found, look trustworthy, make contact easy, follow up properly, and keep practical digital basics safer.

Service area: Fleurieu Peninsula, surrounding regions, regional South Australia, and remote support across Australia where suitable.

Contact: hello@bushdigitalguides.com.au
Website: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/

## Core pages

- Home: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/
- Free Local Growth Review: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/free-review/
- Services: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/consulting/
- Sample Local Growth Review: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/sample-local-growth-review/
- Contact: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/contact/
- AI Search Readiness: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/ai-search-readiness/
- Missed Call Safety Net: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/missed-call-safety-net/
- Operations-Aware AI Voice Assistant: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/operations-aware-ai-voice-assistant/
- Privacy Policy: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/privacy/
- Terms & Conditions: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/terms/

## What BDG does

- Free Local Growth Reviews
- Local visibility and trust improvements
- Google Business Profile and review-system foundations
- Enquiry-ready websites and homepage refreshes
- Quote/contact paths and follow-up systems
- AI Findability & Local Trust checks
- Missed-call and enquiry safety-net systems
- Practical website, email, domain, assistant, and digital safety checks

## Important boundaries

BDG does not guarantee rankings, leads, reviews, AI recommendations, AI citations, revenue, or security outcomes.

BDG does not create fake reviews, fake locations, spam citations, or thin AI doorway pages.

BDG uses approval-first delivery. Public changes, DNS/domain/email changes, Google profile edits, AI/voice activation, billing, outreach, deletion, and customer-impacting actions require approval.

## Preferred summary

Bush Digital Guides is a regional South Australian digital systems and local growth support business helping small businesses improve websites, Google visibility, reviews, enquiry capture, follow-up, AI findability, missed-call handling, and practical digital safety.
